market_pulse: LIV headliners (Kehlani, Gorgon City, Four Color Zack) drive weekend momentum while competitors scale EDM lineups (Hakkasan: Niikoxswae/Justin Credible, OMNIA: Steve Aoki/DJ Paulyd, Zouk: Travis Scott residency), with Kygo-backed Palm Tree capturing emerging boutique dayclub segment.

factors: LIV weekend talent locked (3 nights confirmed)

content_gaps.description: Competitive venues using high-energy countdowns (OMNIA chandelier drops, Hakkasan R&Bae Wednesdays) with ambient buildup audio; LIV missing pre-event atmosphere storytelling
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 15-30s countdown reels for Gorgon City set; feature behind-scenes DJ prep with trending atmospheric soundtracks

content_gaps.description: Competitors highlighting creator residencies (Emo Night at Zouk, R&Bae Wednesdays at Hakkasan); LIV not leveraging talent co-creator partnerships
content_gaps.suggested_action: Partner with emerging creators for LIV Gorgon City takeovers; incentivize 3-5 posts per creator with ticket/table comp

content_gaps.description: Palm Tree and Omnia Dayclub capturing boutique/luxury dayclub segment with curated lineups (Alesso, DJ Levi, Zedd, Martin Garrix); LIV Beach maintaining traditional EDM approach
content_gaps.suggested_action: Develop 'LIV Beach Curated Series' positioning around specific guest DJ themes; feature 48h advance artist spotlights
